title: begonia mollicaulis
intro: Begonia mollicaulis, also known as the Polynesian Begonia or Begonia with hairy stems, is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Begonia mollicaulis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Begonia mollicaulis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
